title: Chicken Gyro for weight loss
description: A macro-friendly, low-calorie version of a classic chicken gyro with homemade tzatziki.
steps: Mix yogurt, lemon juice, and mashed garlic for the marinade.
Add oregano, sazon, coriander, cumin, paprika, and pepper.
Marinate chicken thighs and bake at 375°F until 160°F internal.
Grate cucumber, add yogurt, garlic, lemon zest/juice, dill, and salt for tzatziki.
Slice chicken into strips and sear in a hot cast iron skillet.
Assemble on toasted pita with tzatziki, onions, chicken, and tomatoes.
Toast the assembled gyro in a bit of avocado oil.

title: Numbing Chicken and Cucumber Salad
description: A spicy and numbing Sichuan-inspired chicken salad from the 50/30 Low Cal series.
steps: Poach and shred the chicken breast.
Slice the cucumbers.
Whisk together soy sauce, black vinegar, chili oil, garlic, and Sichuan peppercorns.
Toss chicken and cucumbers in the sauce.
Garnish with cilantro and sesame seeds.

Poach chicken: add ginger, spring onions, msg, and salt to a pan with water. Bring to a simmer, add chicken, simmer for 3 minutes, then cover and turn off heat for 10 minutes. Remove and slice or shred.
Mix all sauce ingredients together, including the poaching liquid, and set aside to chill.
Slice cucumber on an angle into thick strips.
Scatter cucumbers on a platter, top with sliced chicken, and pour over the sauce. Finish with coriander, spring onions, and sesame seeds. Serve with warm rice.

title: Salmon Sushi Cups
description: A quick and easy alternative to sushi bake, perfect for when you crave sushi at home.
steps: Layer nori, sushi rice, and cubed salmon in a muffin tin.
Bake until the top is crispy (approximately 12 minutes).
Top with sliced cucumber, avocado, and spicy mayo.
Layer nori in a cup-like shape (e.g., in a muffin tin).
Add a layer of sushi rice.
Spoon over the salmon.
Bake until the top is crispy (approx. 12 minutes).
Top with slices of avocado and spicy mayo.

title: Masala Mac and Cheese
description: Creamy, cozy fusion mac and cheese packed with bold Indian flavors.
steps: Saute green chili, onions, ginger, garlic, and bell peppers.
Add spices and tomato paste for the base.
Prepare a roux with butter, flour, milk, and cream.
Stir in cheese until smooth, then add cooked pasta.
Top with more cheese and breadcrumbs.
Bake until golden brown.

title: Protein Chick-fil-A Sauce
description: A macro-friendly, high-protein version of the famous Chick-Fil-A sauce using Greek yogurt.
steps: Combine yogurt, mustard, honey, BBQ sauce, lemon juice, and paprika in a jar.
Whisk until completely smooth.
Mix all ingredients in a jar until well combined.
Add milk if a thinner consistency is desired.
Enjoy as a dip or sandwich spread.

title: Spicy Tofu and Chicken Noodles
description: A quick and spicy noodle dish featuring both tofu and chicken for high protein content.
steps: Saute chicken and tofu until cooked through.
Boil noodles and drain.
Combine soy sauce, chili crisp, garlic, and ginger for the sauce.
Toss everything together with bok choy until wilted.
Cook tofu and chicken with a blend of spices.
Toss with noodles and serve.
Make the sauce: pulse silken tofu, tahini, soy sauce, miso, gochugaru, and vinegar in a blender until smooth. Set aside.
Julienne the spring onions and pick the coriander. Slice the cucumber into thin rounds and then strips.
Cook the chicken in a hot pan until colored. Deglaze with mirin, add soy and oyster sauce, and cook for a few more minutes.
Cook the udon noodles according to package instructions.
Plate the noodles, pour over the sauce, and top with chicken on one side and the cucumber/herb salad on the other. Finish with sesame seeds.

title: Spicy Tuna Crispy Rice
description: Crunchy fried rice blocks topped with fresh spicy tuna and creamy avocado.
steps: Cook and season sushi rice, then press into a block and chill.
Cut into rectangles and fry until golden and crispy.
Mix tuna with Sriracha and mayo.
Top rice with avocado, spicy tuna, and a slice of jalapeño.

title: Garlic Parmesan Chicken Skewers
description: Savory grilled chicken skewers glazed with a rich garlic parmesan butter.
steps: Cube chicken and season with salt, pepper, and olive oil.
Thread onto skewers and grill or air fry.
Whisk together melted butter, garlic, parmesan, and parsley.
Brush the hot chicken skewers with the garlic parmesan mixture.

title: Buffalo Chicken Mac and Cheese
description: A spicy, cheesy twist on classic mac and cheese with buffalo-seasoned chicken.
steps: Cook pasta and set aside.
Toss shredded chicken in buffalo sauce.
Melt cream cheese with cheddar, mozzarella, and ranch to make the sauce.
Combine pasta, chicken, and sauce in a baking dish.
Top with remaining cheese and bake until bubbly.
Garnish with sliced green onions.

title: Air Fryer Hot Honey Chicken
description: Crispy air-fried chicken bites finished with a sweet and spicy hot honey glaze.
steps: Dredge chicken pieces in flour, dip in egg wash, and coat with panko.
Air fry until crispy and golden.
Heat honey with hot sauce and chili flakes for the glaze.
Toss the hot chicken in the glaze until well coated.

title: McDonald's McChicken
description: A home-made, lower-calorie version of the classic McDonald's McChicken sandwich.
steps: Mince the chicken breast and combine with seasonings.
Form into patties of approximately 105g each.
Coat each patty in crushed cornflakes.
Air fry the patties, adding black pepper on top.
Assemble the sandwich with a low-calorie bun, low-fat mayo, air-fried chicken patty, and romaine lettuce.

title: Mapo Tofu
description: A simple, protein-packed version of the classic Chinese dish Mapo Tofu.
steps: Brown the ground beef in a pan.
Add chopped garlic, ginger, and green onion.
Pour in a splash of cooking wine.
Add the Mapo Tofu sauces.
Add a cornstarch slurry to thicken the sauce.
Add the tofu at the end and gently mix everything together.
Let it simmer before serving.

title: Masala Egg Curry (Dhaba Style)
description: An easy-to-follow recipe for a flavorful, restaurant-style Indian egg curry.
steps: Medium boil 6 to 7 eggs so the yolks remain jammy.
Heat oil in a pan and fry the eggs for 2-3 minutes with turmeric, chili powder, and salt; then set aside.
In the same pan, heat more oil and add whole spices (cinnamon, black cardamom, green cardamom, bay leaf).
Add diced onion and cook on medium heat for 8-10 minutes until soft.
Add diced tomatoes, green chilies, ginger-garlic paste, and remaining spices.
Pour in 1.5 cups of water, cover, and cook for 15-20 minutes on medium heat to form the gravy.
Finish by adding chopped cilantro and the fried eggs.

title: Frozen Protein Oreo Fluff
description: A high-protein, low-calorie frozen dessert that tastes like an Oreo Blizzard.
steps: Scrape the cream out of the middle of 5 Oreos.
Place the chocolate cookies in a bag and smash them into crumbs.
Add the vanilla protein powder and sugar-free vanilla pudding mix to the tub of Cool Whip.
Add the Oreo crumbs to the mixture.
Gently fold the ingredients together slowly to keep the air in the Cool Whip.
Freeze for about 3 hours until perfectly frozen.

title: Thai Inspired Beef Summer Rolls
description: Refreshing summer rolls filled with seasoned extra lean ground beef and served with a high-protein peanut dipping sauce.
ingredients: Peanut Sauce: 4 tbsp PB2 powder, 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1/4 cup water, 1 tbsp garlic, 1 tbsp Thai red chili paste, 1 tbsp fish oil, 1 tbsp honey
steps: Cook the extra lean ground beef with green onions, shredded carrots, soy sauce, garlic, onion powder, lemongrass paste, and basil paste.
Dip a spring roll wrapper quickly in water and place on a cutting board.
Layer the wrapper with jalapenos, 1/2 cup of the beef mixture, green onions, cilantro, and mixed greens.
Fold the top and bottom of the wrapper over the filling, then roll it up like a burrito.
Prepare the dipping sauce by mixing PB2, soy sauce, fish sauce, garlic, water, red curry paste, and honey until smooth.
Cook the ground beef with garlic, lemongrass paste, basil paste, onion powder, and soy sauce until browned.
Prepare the peanut sauce by mixing PB2, soy sauce, water, garlic, chili paste, fish oil, and honey.
Dip a spring roll wrapper in water to soften.
Fill with cooked beef, grated carrots, green onions, cilantro, jalapeño, and baby greens.
Roll up tightly and serve with the peanut dipping sauce.

title: Ginger Scallion Salmon with Avocado
description: A luxury one-pot meal featuring steamed salmon over rice, topped with a bright, raw ginger-scallion sauce, creamy avocado, and a spicy kick.
steps: Prepare a ginger-scallion sauce using raw ingredients to keep it bright and punchy.
Steam the salmon directly on top of the rice in one pot.
Add half a fresh avocado to the dish.
Top with spicy sauce and sesame seeds before serving.

title: Spicy Salmon Musubi
description: A pocket-sized version of a classic spicy salmon bowl with masago and torched mayo from the Season 3 Musubi series.
steps: Season the salmon with a spicy mixture.
Assemble the musubi by layering rice and salmon, then wrapping with nori.
Wash rice thoroughly and cook it.
Slice salmon into musubi-shaped sizes and season lightly with salt and pepper.
Cook salmon on low-medium heat until all sides are brown. Set aside.
Prepare sauce by mixing kewpie mayo, lemon/lime, sugar, sriracha, and masago.
Cut 4 nori sheets into halves.
Assemble musubi by filling 2/3 of your musubi mold with cooked rice. Press down with mold. Sprinkle furikake.
Press mold down all the way then release the outside mold while pressing down.
Layer your mayo sauce, top with cooked salmon, then spread more spicy mayo sauce on top.
Torch the mayo until slightly charred.
Wrap with nori sheet with 'shiny' side outside and 'rough' side inside.

title: Chili Crunch Sushi Dip Crunchwrap
description: A viral fusion dish that packs the flavors of sushi dip into a convenient, crispy crunchwrap.
steps: Mix sushi ingredients together to form a dip.
Place the mixture inside a tortilla and fold into a crunchwrap shape.
Sear in a pan until the tortilla is golden and crispy.

title: Indian Style Eggs (Bhurji)
description: An incredible and flavorful Indian scrambled egg dish made in a single pan with aromatic spices.
steps: Melt ghee in a pan and caramelize the red onion.
Add cumin seeds and toast until fragrant.
Add green chili and ginger garlic paste.
Stir in garam masala, turmeric, Kashmiri red chili powder, and salt.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they soften and melt into the base.
Whisk the eggs and gently fold them into the mixture, cooking until soft.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and optional cheese.

title: Creamy Udon with Silken Tofu
description: A dairy-free, high-protein udon dish that uses silken tofu to achieve a rich and creamy texture.
steps: Blend silken tofu with sesame oil and a touch of sweetener until smooth.
Mix the creamy tofu sauce with cooked udon noodles.

title: Vietnamese Prawn Spring Rolls
description: Fresh and healthy Vietnamese-style rice paper rolls filled with prawns and crisp vegetables.
steps: Soften the rice paper by dipping it in water.
Layer the prawns, lettuce, and cucumber on the rice paper.
Roll tightly and serve immediately.

title: Prawn and Citrus Noodle Salad
description: Episode 11 of 50-30 Local, featuring a high-protein, low-calorie noodle salad with prawns and citrus.
steps: Prepare noodles according to package instructions.
Sauté or grill prawns until cooked.
Combine prawns, noodles, and salad ingredients.
Dress with citrus-based sauce.
Prep the veg: finely chop lemongrass, pick herbs, julienne spring onions and cucumbers, halve cherry tomatoes, and segment citrus fruit.
Prepare prawns: pulse prawns in a food processor with half the lemongrass, 1 tbsp fish sauce, a clove of grated garlic, and 2 tsp of chili flakes until minced.
Cook prawns in avocado oil for 4-5 minutes, breaking up as you go. Set aside.
Make the dressing: pound remaining lemongrass, garlic, and chili into a rough paste. Add remaining dressing ingredients and mix well.
Cook noodles in boiling salted water for 2 minutes, drain, and rinse under cold water.
Combine noodles, veggies, and prawns in a bowl. Pour over the dressing, mix, and enjoy.

title: Thai Basil Beef Inspired Bowl
description: A quick, easy, and flavorful beef bowl perfect for weeknight dinners or meal prep.
steps: Sauté peppers and onions in a pan.
Add lean ground beef and cook through.
Stir in garlic, ginger, green onion, and basil.
Season with salt and pepper.
Add soy sauce, fish sauce, honey, and brown sugar.
Continue mixing and cooking until the beef is caramelized and slightly crispy.

title: Honey Soy Chicken Salad
description: Episode 10 of 50-30 Local, featuring a high-protein chicken salad with a honey soy dressing.
ingredients: 1 tbsp Shaoxing Wine or Chicken Stock
steps: Prepare chicken (cook until done).
Mix honey and soy sauce to create the dressing.
Toss chicken and greens with the dressing.
Make the sauce: pulse silken tofu in a blender until smooth. Mix in miso, chili crisp, peanut butter, lime juice, and salt. Set aside.
Grill corn until charred, then remove kernels from the cob.
Shred the Hispi cabbage and iceberg lettuce. Halve the tomatoes, slice spring onions, and julienne the cucumber.
Cook chicken in oil until browned. Add honey, dark soy, and grated garlic, cooking for another couple of minutes. Deglaze with wine and season with salt.
Combine all vegetables in a bowl, cover with dressing, and mix well.
Divide between bowls, top with the chicken, and finish with tajin, sesame seeds, and crispy onions.

title: Lemon Pepper Chicken
description: An easy, flavorful chicken dish ready in 30 minutes with a fresh avocado-feta topping.
steps: Marinate chicken in lemon juice, lemon zest, paprika, and garlic.
Roast chicken until perfectly tender and juicy.
Prepare topping by tossing avocado, feta, dill, and chives with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Spoon the avocado-feta topping over the chicken and serve with an extra squeeze of lemon.

title: High Protein Mac and Cheese
description: A healthy, high-protein version of comfort food mac and cheese, ready in under 10 minutes.
steps: Cook pasta until tender.
Combine with prepared high-protein, low-calorie cheese sauce.
Serve warm.

title: Cilantro Lime Chicken
description: A lean and protein-packed chicken recipe.
steps: Marinate chicken with cilantro and lime.
Cook until internal temperature reaches safety standards (grilling or pan-searing).

title: Creamy Cajun Salmon Pasta
description: Creamy Cajun salmon pasta made with tender seared salmon bites tossed in a rich tomato-cream sauce, Cajun spices, garlic, and a splash of lemon for balance.
steps: Season salmon with Cajun seasoning, onion powder, garlic salt, paprika + olive oil. Sear until cooked, set aside.
In same pan, sauté onion + garlic. Stir in tomato paste and cook down.
Add heavy cream + seasonings + lemon juice.
Loosen sauce with pasta water until silky.
Toss in pasta, then fold in salmon.
Finish with parsley.

title: Frozen Oreo Fluff
description: A high-protein frozen dessert treat featuring Oreo crumbs and protein powder.
steps: Gently fold in your protein powder, sf pudding mix, and oreo chocolate cookie crumbs (no cream) into your sugar free cool whip.
Freeze up to 3 hours & enjoy your frozen treat.

title: Creamy Gochujang Beef Udon
description: A flavorful and creamy udon dish with a spicy gochujang and silken tofu sauce.
steps: Into a blender add the silken tofu, 1 Tsp Stevia, 1 Tsp Salt, 1 Tsp Sesame Oil and blend.
On a medium high heat, spray with cooking spray and add green onion, minced garlic and 1 Tbsp Gochujang. Cook until fragrant.
Add a splash of water or chicken stock and add the ground beef and cook until it has developed a nice golden crust.
Cook until most of the liquid has evaporated and the ground beef is fully cooked.
Boil udon noodles according to package instructions.
Combine the udon noodles, blended silken tofu sauce and ground beef mixture and enjoy!

title: Kale Caesar Pasta Salad
description: A hearty pasta salad by @grossypelosi featuring baby kale and a homemade Caesar dressing.
ingredients: 1 pound mezze rigatoni or other short pasta
1 cup panko or homemade bread crumbs
Zest of 2 lemons (reserve lemons for dressing)
4 cups packed baby kale leaves (5 ounces) or 1-inch Tuscan kale ribbons, stems removed
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add pasta and cook until al dente. Drain and spread on a tray to cool.
In a medium skillet, toast bread crumbs with lemon zest, garlic, 2 tbsp oil, salt, and pepper until golden (4-5 mins).
Make the dressing: Blend mayonnaise, grated Parmesan, anchovies, garlic, lemon juice, mustard, salt, and pepper until smooth.
In a large bowl, massage kale with remaining 1 tbsp olive oil until tender.
Add cooled pasta and 1 1/2 cups of the dressing and toss until well mixed. Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours.
Before serving, add Parmesan shavings, half of the breadcrumbs, and extra dressing as needed. Garnish with remaining breadcrumbs.

title: Grilled Asparagus
description: Simple grilled asparagus seasoned with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
ingredients: 1 bundle of asparagus, ends trimmed off
2 large sweet potatoes, cut into cubes
steps: Toss the asparagus with oil and generously season with salt & pepper.
Heat your grill (or grill pan) to medium-high heat. Brush with oil.
Add the asparagus to the grill and cook for 3-5 minutes or until tender & slightly charred.
Toss the potatoes in avocado oil. Generously season with salt & black pepper.
Air fry at 390 degrees for 20 minutes, flipping halfway through.

title: High Protein Dirt Dessert
description: A high-protein version of the childhood favorite dirt dessert.

title: Mapo Egg Tofu
description: A high-protein Mapo Tofu variation using eggs and silken tofu.
steps: Cook minced pork in a pan until cooked. Add mapo sauce and cook for a few more minutes. Set aside.
Add a block of silken tofu to a pan and cut into pieces.
Whisk eggs and pour onto tofu. Cover to cook for about 3-4 minutes.
Add mapo minced pork on top of tofu.
Top with green onions and chili oil.

title: Mapo Tofu (Beef Version)
description: Step-by-step tutorial for comforting and high-protein mapo tofu.

title: Marinated Avocado
description: A perfect side-dish recipe for meal-prep featuring marinated avocado slices.
ingredients: 1 clove of minced or grated garlic
steps: Slice avocado.
In a container, add all marinade ingredients and mix well.
Put sliced avocado into marinated sauce.
Let it rest in the fridge for about 2-3 hours.
Enjoy with rice.

title: Animal Style In N Out Pasta
description: A pasta dish inspired by In N Out's animal style flavors.
steps: Cook pasta and reserve water.
Prepare animal sauce by blending cottage cheese, pasta water, ketchup, and relish.
Cook ground beef and sauté onions in oil.
Combine pasta, beef, onions, cheese sauce, and animal sauce. Finish with parsley.

title: Chili Crunch Sushi Dip & Sushi Crunch Wrap
description: A viral, spicy, umami-forward, and crunchy sushi-inspired dip and wrap made with chili crunch.
ingredients: Sushi rice (with rice vinegar, sugar, & mirin)
Batter for round nori (1:1 water to flour ratio)
steps: Prepare sushi rice with vinegar, sugar, and mirin.
For the dip: combine tuna, mayo, and chili crunch in a bowl.
For the wrap: prepare a round nori by dipping in batter and frying (implied from 'Sushi Crunch Wrap').
Layer the wrap with sushi rice, sliced cucumber, sliced avocado, and the tuna dip mixture.
Add optional layers like spicy mayo and krab if desired.
Wrap everything in a full sheet of nori.

title: Creamy Mapo Tofu Udon
description: A simple and spicy mapo tofu version served with udon noodles and a unique creamy tofu-peanut butter sauce.
steps: Mince garlic and chop scallions, separating the green and white parts.
In a lightly oiled pan, cook garlic and white scallions on medium heat.
Add doubanjiang (about 2-3 tbsp per lb of meat). Add in ground pork and cook til it fully browns.
Add in cooking wine, black vinegar, black pepper, and paprika to taste. Set aside.
In a pot cook udon for 2 min in boiling water, strain and set aside.
Drain tofu from package and blend with 1 tbsp of peanut butter (add a bit of water for smoothness). Set aside.
Plate by placing in udon first, then your meat and chopped green scallions then tofu cream.
Top with chili crisp and enjoy!

title: Air Fried Spicy McChicken
description: A healthier, high-protein, air-fried version of the classic McChicken sandwich.
ingredients: Low calorie bun (e.g., Culture Keto Buns)
Light Mayo (e.g., Miracle Whip light mayo)
steps: Mince the chicken if using breast or tenderloin.
Combine chicken with paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Form into patties (approximately 105g each for single servings).
Coat each patty in panko crumbs.
Air fry the patties until cooked through (internal 165F).
Assemble the sandwich with a low-calorie bun, light mayo, the spicy chicken patty, and romaine lettuce.
macros: 196 Calories | 23g-32g Protein | 4g-6.8g Fat | 9g-22g Carbs per sandwich

title: Protein Mac & Cheese
description: A 5-ingredient, high-protein comfort food recipe that takes less than 10 minutes to make.
steps: Cook the pasta in the bone broth in a pan.
Blend together the cottage cheese, nutritional yeast, 1 tbsp of water, and any other seasonings you want like garlic, salt, onion, pepper, etc.
Once the pasta is cooked, add in the blended mixture and melt the shredded cheese on top.

title: Deli Container Snack (Tuna & Cucumber)
description: A high-volume, low-calorie savory snack from the Deli Container Snack Series (DCSS).
steps: Slice the cucumber and red onion thinly using a mandolin.
Combine all of the ingredients in a deli container.
Put a lid on, shake it all up, and enjoy.

title: Slow Cooker Honey Chipotle Chicken Burritos
description: High protein, meal-prep friendly burritos made with tender shredded chicken in a creamy chipotle sauce.
ingredients: 10 Low Calorie Tortillas (e.g., Extreme Wellness wraps)
Optional: 1/4 avocado, fat reduced Mexican cheese
steps: Add chicken breast, garlic salt, onion powder, chipotle peppers, and honey to a crockpot. Cook until chicken is tender enough to shred.
Prepare the sauce by blending cottage cheese, tomato sauce, garlic, and milk.
Cook the rice separately.
Shred the cooked chicken and mix with the prepared sauce and cooked rice.
Assemble the burritos by adding the chicken mixture and fat-free mozzarella to the tortillas.
Optionally add avocado or extra cheese before rolling.
macros: 455-531 Calories | 50g-65g Protein | 4g-19g Fat | 40g-52g Carbs per burrito

title: Spicy Salmon (Sushi Grade)
description: A high-protein, low-fat preparation of spicy salmon for sushi, bowls, or snacks.
steps: Dice the sushi-grade salmon into small cubes.
In a bowl, combine salmon with light mayo, sriracha, chopped spring onions, and sesame oil.
Mix well and top with sesame seeds if desired.
Serve as is, in sushi, or over rice (note: macros provided are without rice).

title: Triple Triple Burger (In-N-Out Style)
description: A macro-friendly version of a massive triple-patty burger with a custom lower-calorie sauce.
ingredients: Garlic powder, Onion powder, Black pepper, Salt
Sauce: 15g light mayo, 8g sweet relish, 8g mustard, 8g ketchup, 1 tsp vinegar, 1 tsp paprika, chopped onions
steps: Season the lean beef with garlic powder, onion powder, black pepper, salt, and meat tenderizer.
Form into three thin patties.
Sear the patties in a pan, spreading mustard on one side while cooking.
Place a slice of American cheese on each patty to melt.
Prepare the sauce by mixing all sauce ingredients together.
Assemble the burger on a keto bun with lettuce, tomato, the three patties, and the special sauce.

title: Cilantro Lime Chicken Crispy Sandwich
description: A crispy air-fried chicken sandwich featuring a sweet and tangy cilantro lime sauce and a fresh cucumber salad.
ingredients: Cilantro lime sauce: 1 tbsp avocado oil, 1/2 cup lime juice, 1 tbsp honey, 1 tsp cumin, salt, pepper, 3 garlic cloves, 1/2 cup water
Cucumber salad: Cucumber, cabbage, jalapeño, honey pickle juice, salt, pepper, onion powder, garlic powder, lime zest
steps: Dredge the chicken in flour, then egg, then crushed corn flakes.
Air fry at 285F for 18-20 minutes, flipping halfway, until internal temperature reaches 165F.
In a pan, combine cilantro lime sauce ingredients and reduce over medium heat.
Prepare cucumber salad by slicing vegetables and shaking with the other ingredients.
Assemble the sandwich on ciabatta bread with the crispy chicken, reduced sauce, and cucumber salad.
macros: Total: 45g Protein. Chicken: 184 cals/40g P. Sauce: 120 cals. Bread: 115 cals/5g P

title: Thai Basil Beef with Chili Crunch Cucumbers
description: A flavorful and aromatic Thai-inspired ground beef stir fry served with spicy, honey-glazed cucumbers.
ingredients: Thai Basil Beef: 2 tbsp beef tallow, 1 yellow onion, red and green bell peppers, 1 lb lean ground beef (90/10), 3-4 tbsp minced garlic, 2 tbsp ginger paste, 3/4 cup green onions, 1.5 cups fresh basil, 1/4 cup soy sauce, 2 tbsp fish sauce, 1/4 cup honey, 2-3 tbsp brown sugar
Chili Crunch Cucumbers: 1 english cucumber, 2 tbsp chili crunch, 3-4 tbsp honey, 2-3 tbsp seasoned rice vinegar, 2 tbsp sesame seeds, 1 tsp toasted sesame oil, salt and garlic powder
Toppings: Sriracha mayo, fresh cilantro, sesame seeds
steps: For cucumbers: Combine all ingredients and toss. Garnish with peanuts and green onions.
For beef: Heat beef tallow in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sauté peppers and onions for a few minutes.
Add ground beef and sear to build a crust, then break up and mix with veggies.
Add garlic, ginger, green onions, and basil.
Season with salt and pepper, then add soy sauce, fish sauce, honey, and brown sugar.
Cook until everything is caramelized and crispy.
Assemble your bowl with the beef and cucumber salad.
